name: Bisquick Blueberry Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease the bottoms of 12 medium muffin cups or line them with paper baking cups.
3. Beat the egg slightly in a medium bowl.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients, except for the blueberries, until just moistened.
5. Gently fold in the blueberries into the batter.
6. Divide the batter evenly among the prepared muffin cups.
7. Bake for 15-18 minutes or until golden brown.
